heading: Hand-picked starting points
subhead: Three pages worth reading even if you read nothing else on the site.

items.title: The Power of Compounding
items.excerpt: The single idea that does most of the heavy lifting in personal finance. Small consistent savings, given enough time, can become surprisingly large sums.

items.title: Why Invest?
items.excerpt: Two Pakistanis with the same salary. One keeps savings in a bank, the other invests on PSX. After twenty years, in real terms, their wealth gap is enormous.

items.title: Risk and Return
items.excerpt: Higher returns require higher risk. There is no investment that delivers high returns with no risk. Once you understand this, half the dubious schemes become easy to spot.
